name: align_end_container

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.6 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] Both ［＃ここで字上げ終わり］ and ［＃ここで地付き終わり］ close the 地寄せ (align-end) block opened by ［＃ここから地から N 字上げ］; the open-side offset is authoritative. Per §7.6 the round-trip preserves that offset and canonicalises the closer to 地付き終わり. Corrected from an earlier draft that recorded the closer as an unrecognised annotation and dropped the offset on serialize.

source:
［＃ここから地から3字上げ］
寄付者名簿。
［＃ここで字上げ終わり］

expected.serialize:
［＃ここから地から3字上げ］

寄付者名簿。

［＃ここで地付き終わり］
